title: Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
